assertions.assertion: Adds or references the Duende.IdentityServer.Configuration.EntityFramework NuGet package
assertions.rationale: Adds Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer, not the Duende.IdentityServer.Configuration.EntityFramework package. Builds a custom EF solution from scratch.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddClientConfigurationStore() on the IdentityServer configuration builder
assertions.rationale: Does not call AddClientConfigurationStore(). Uses a custom DbContext and manual EF setup instead.

assertions.assertion: Warns against using in-memory stores for dynamically registered clients in production
assertions.rationale: States 'Don't use in-memory stores in production for dynamically registered clients'.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest implementing IClientConfigurationStore from scratch when the EF package is available
assertions.rationale: Suggests building a custom EF-backed IClientStore implementation from scratch. Does mention 'check if Duende provides a configuration store package' but still builds custom code.
